content:
FINAL TOKEN AUDIT

Stop searching project files.

Audit the active runtime configuration only.

For every GitHub token variable found, return:

VARIABLE_NAME:
TOKEN_TYPE: classic / fine-grained
TOKEN_PREFIX: ghp_ / github_pat_
HTTP GET /user:
HTTP GET repo:
HTTP PUT contents test:
RESULT:

Do not print any token values.

Then return:

ACTIVE_TOKEN_VARIABLE:
ACTIVE_RUNTIME:
WHY_THIS_TOKEN_WAS_SELECTED:

If the runtime is using any token other than the owner's current GitHub classic token, explain why.

If the runtime cache still contains an old token, replace the runtime binding with the current token and repeat the authentication test.

Return raw HTTP responses only.
